intent: Write a focused brief on 'baby-to-toddler transition items' blending storefront picks with community wisdom from parents. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the baby and toys-games categories and collect at least 3 transition-age products (toddler dish set, training cup, early STEM toy). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/AskReddit for posts from parents on transition-stage items. Collect at least 2 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) list the 3 storefront picks, (b) synthesize community consensus on what actually helps, (c) recommend a single under-$40 bundle. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. Narrow baby-to-toddler age-stage problem.
